courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Stealth Encounter Level
genericDescription: Design patrol routes, vision cones, cover, and escape paths; balance failure states; create readable stealth affordances.
specificDescription: Build a stealth game or level with at least three guards or sensors, two routes to the objective, and one recoverable mistake state before failure.
gradingRubric: 30 pts stealth encounter design; 20 pts route choice; 20 pts feedback and readability; 15 pts recoverability; 15 pts notes.
